LanguageData.Ironbark_Explosion.label: Core Detonation
LanguageData.Ironbark_Explosion.description: Detonates the mechanoid, instantly destroying it and damaging all nearby entities regardless of allegiance.
LanguageData.NCL_Bidirectional_Shielding_System.label: Binary Veil System Deployment
LanguageData.NCL_Bidirectional_Shielding_System.descr: Deploys smokescreen generators to create visual-obscurement fields while simultaneously launching two Gyro-Blades.
LanguageData.NCL_Blazing_Core_Penetrator.label: Solaris Penetrator
LanguageData.NCL_Blazing_Core_Penetrator.description: Propels toward target, displacing enemies along trajectory and generating large-area effect at impact zone.
LanguageData.NCL_FlyingKick.label: Kinetic Assault
LanguageData.NCL_FlyingKick.description: Propels toward target, displacing enemies along trajectory and generating large-area effect at impact zone.
LanguageData.NCL_Invisibility.label: Invisibility
LanguageData.NCL_MechSelfRepair.label: SelfRepair
LanguageData.NCL_Phantom_Force.label: Phantom Strike
LanguageData.NCL_ToggleCodexTurret.label: Shoulder Turret Deployment
LanguageData.NCL_ToggleCodexTurret.description: extend or retract a tiny, shoulder mounted automatic turret
LanguageData.QuantumShift.label: Quantum Shift
LanguageData.QuantumShift.description: Yggdrasil-root inspired quantum translocation system enabling terrain-ignoring free teleportation.
LanguageData.Terminus_Gaze.label: Terminus Gaze
LanguageData.Terminus_Gaze.description: This lunar bionic-derived combat protocol enables temporary omnipotent combat state: perfect accuracy, zero action delay, instant target acquisition, dark-phase teleportation, and cryonic suspension of enemies in shadows. The godlike state lasts precisely 5 hours before neural collapse renders the implantee combat-ineffective.
LanguageData.Zero_Point_Overdrive.label: Zero-Point Flash
LanguageData.Zero_Point_Overdrive.description: Overdrives nanomachines for instantaneous spatial translocation. Impact releases kinetic shockwave devastating nearby enemies while generating 16 unstable energy arcs. Post-translocation, user enters enhanced combat mode with significantly increased mobility, defense, and attack frequency.
LanguageData.NCL_MechSelfRepair.label: Self Repair
LanguageData.NCL_MechSelfRepair.description: Self Repair, can recover 15 scars on the user itself
